arts.sum: Asked about the transfer state of play ahead of Derby’s Championship clash with Cardiff City on Saturday (3pm), Warne said: “I think we’re progressing really well. Amid links to Fraulo, Warne continued: “We do have foreign targets, whether we press on any of them I don’t know.
